title: [docs] Migrate to Tailwind CSS v4
body:
### Steps to reproduce Open docs ### Current behavior Docs is for v3 ### Expected behavior Docs is for v4 ### Context Same as https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/1375 ### Your environment
npx @mui/envinfo ``` Don't forget to mention which browser you used. Output from `npx @mui/envinfo` goes here. ```
**Search keywords**: -
